summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Safe-Spend backend APIs and frontend integration. All backend APIs working perfectly (14/14 tests passed). Frontend authentication and dashboard functionality working correctly after fixing AuthContext JSON parsing bug.

ui_bugs.issue: Logout button selector needs adjustment - button is present as 'Log out' at bottom of sidebar

passed_tests: POST /api/v1/auth/signup - creates organization with org_ prefix
POST /api/v1/auth/login - authenticates and returns JWT token
GET /api/v1/auth/me - returns current org profile with valid JWT
POST /api/v1/escrow-accounts - creates escrow account with esc_ prefix
POST /api/v1/api-keys - creates API key with key_ prefix and proper sk_agent_ format
POST /api/v1/spend - creates spend request with spr_ prefix, deducts from balance when approved
POST /api/v1/spend - properly denies spend request with insufficient funds
Spend request with API key authentication works correctly
Invalid API key properly rejected with 401 status
Frontend signup flow connects to real backend and creates account
Frontend login flow connects to real backend and authenticates
Dashboard loads after authentication with proper navigation
Dashboard sidebar navigation works (9 navigation items found)
Navigation to Escrow Accounts, API Keys, and Settings sections works
